pieces.title: Gloom
pieces.description: One of my first ever pieces! Done for a daily theme.

pieces.title: Buried Treasure
pieces.description: Buried treasure, done for a daily theme.

pieces.title: Aurora Borealis
pieces.description: An aurora done for a daily theme. I think this was my first time using the blur feature.

pieces.title: Tiny Samurai
pieces.description: I pretty much copied this exactly from Brandom James Greer, though at the time I had no idea who he was, or that he'd turn into one of my biggest pixel art inspirations.

pieces.title: Christmas Tree
pieces.description: This was done for a daily challenge for the holidays.

pieces.title: Jingle Bells
pieces.description: Another holiday challenge. I remember being blown away by how dimensional this looked and how cool the specular highlight looked.

pieces.title: Houseplants
pieces.description: A cute little cactus for a daily theme! I remember that I used a video game screenshot for the reference, but can't remember which one :(

pieces.title: Peacock
pieces.description: I remember being really happy with how the peacock turned out, but so confused as to what to do for a background haha.

pieces.title: Sunflower
pieces.description: I was SO proud of this one, I changed all my profile pictures to this one and neverr went back!
